task: FH-2 Loan Wizard — Finance Hub centerpiece, PREVIEW/COMPUTE-ONLY (Tier 3). One form computes the full preview-first draft set a financed asset purchase would create: loan record (Note Payable long-term / Loan Payable current by term), fixed asset + straight-line depreciation schedule, down-payment, amortization schedule, and a BALANCED opening JE (Dr asset / Cr note payable / Cr cash — balances or fails). ZERO ledger writes: loan-math.ts + preview.service.ts are PURE (no DB client); the route only validates + flag-checks + returns the computed preview as data. Entire feature gated behind its own new OFF flag FINANCE_HUB_LOAN_WIZARD_ENABLED (migration 202606160000 registers it default false) — route returns 404 feature_disabled when OFF; frontend tab/page hidden when OFF. Structural boundary enforced by scripts/verify-fh2-no-posting.mjs (FAILS on posting_batches / journal_entry_postings / INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE accounting.* / posting-engine calls in any FH-2 file). Pure unit tests prove SUM(debits)=SUM(credits) on the previewed opening JE + amortization/depreciation correctness (no DB). POSTING is a DEFERRED, separate Tier-1 PR behind this same flag with full GUARD ceremony — explicitly NOT in this PR. Additive-only; no posting engine / EXPENSE_GL_POSTING_ENABLED / shipped-module behavior touched. Ship on green CI, Jorge merges.
